MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO APPOINT RICHARD B. COLE AS RECEIVER.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. No opposition filed. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. = (610/EAH)
